extras.title: 表示“减少”的动词
extras.content: diminish:使人感到原物明显减少,但并未完全消失 decrease:强调数目逐渐地、不断地减少 dwindle:强调变得越来越少,终至全无
at this rate 照这种情形,既然这样 // at any rate 无论如何,至少

extras.title: 表示“比率”的名词
extras.content: rate:指部分相对整体形成的比率,如:divorce rate 离婚率 ratio:指两个数值之间的比值,该词所涉及的两个比较项必须同时出现

senses.def_en: without limits in space or time
senses.example: Indulging in computer games all day may do infinite harm to students.
senses.example_zh: 终日沉溺于电脑游戏可能会对学生危害无穷。

senses.example: Do you believe in eternal love?
I am tired of your eternal arguments.
senses.example_zh: 我讨厌你那没完没了的争论。

senses.example: The layout of the house is not good; Moreover, it's too expensive.
senses.example_zh: 这幢房子的布局不好，另外，价钱也太高了。

senses.def_en: to make smaller or less; reduce or lessen
senses.example: The heat diminished after the heavy rain. // These drugs diminish blood flow to the brain.
senses.example_zh: 一场大雨后，温度降了下来。// 这些药物会减少流向大脑的血液量。

entries.mnemonic: de(down)+crease(生长)→生长速度下降→减少

senses.def_en: to become less or smaller, as in number, amount, or intensity
senses.example: They are making efforts to decrease the military spending. // The population of the area has decreased radically.
senses.example_zh: 他们正在努力减少军费开支。// 该地区的人口急速下降。

senses.example: There has been a steady decrease in population in this city.
senses.example_zh: 这个城市的人口在持续下降。

senses.def_en: to become gradually less until little remains
senses.example: The number of wild animals on the earth is dwindling.
senses.example_zh: 地球上野生动物的数量正日渐减少。

senses.def_en: the speed at which sth. happens over a period of time
senses.example: We drove at a steady rate. // the rate of economic growth
senses.example_zh: 我们以平稳的速度开车。// 经济增长的速度

senses.def_en: a measure of a part with respect to a whole
senses.example: You'll find our current interest rate very competitive.
senses.example_zh: 你会发现我们目前的利率很具竞争力。

senses.example: Call your family at night, for night telephone rates are cheaper than day rates.
senses.example_zh: 晚上给家里打电话吧，因为晚上的电话费比白天便宜。

senses.def_en: to estimate the value of sth./sb.
senses.example: How do you rate yourself as a professional?
senses.example_zh: 作为一位专业人士，你如何评估自己？

senses.def_en: to state that a film, movie, etc. is suitable for a particular audience
senses.example: The movie is rated G for general audiences.
senses.example_zh: 影片定为G级，即老少皆宜。

senses.example: That joke didn't rate a laugh.

derivatives: second-rate a. 二流的,劣质的

senses.example: The university scored a top rating among students.
senses.example_zh: 这所大学在学生中最受欢迎。

senses.example: NBC executives are waiting to see how the show fares in the ratings.
senses.example_zh: (美国)全国广播公司的经理们正在等着瞧这档节目会得到怎样的收视率。

senses.def_en: relation in degree or number between two similar things
senses.example: The ratio of hydrogen to oxygen in water is 2 to 1.
